since_last: 73% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.49%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.37% · BTC +1.07% · Gold +0.10% · Nasdaq100 +1.00%. 73% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.49%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.49%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at +0.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +6.04%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +6.04%, BABA +5.80%, TER +5.44%, MDB +5.34%, MU +5.19%. Laggards: AAPL -2.82%, ORCL -2.62%, AI -2.04%, TLN -1.92%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.27% at $124.33
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.27% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
